title: Purely Comforting Mexican Sweet Potatoes Fajitas
description: A fresh and comforting Mexican dish featuring sweet potatoes, this recipe is a perfect blend of sugars and spices, made in a donabe vessel and served as fajitas.
instructions: Preheat the donabe vessel over medium heat.
Add the olive oil to the donabe and swirl it around to coat the bottom.
Add the sliced onion to the donabe and cook until it is translucent.
Add the sliced bell pepper to the donabe and cook until it is tender.
Add the sliced sweet potatoes to the donabe and cook until they are tender and lightly browned.
Sprinkle the fajita seasoning over the sweet potatoes and stir to combine.
Squeeze the lime juice over the sweet potatoes and stir to combine.
Season the sweet potatoes with salt and black pepper to taste.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Assemble the fajitas by placing a portion of the sweet potato mixture onto a tortilla and topping with sliced avocado and a dollop of sour cream, if desired.
